_comment: PR 16 strategic claim cleanup — patterns and literals exempted from inline-classification requirement. See scripts/check-strategic-claims.mjs and docs/plans/2026-05-01-a-grade-remediation-plan-merged.md PR 16 section. Lower bar to extend; raise the bar to add inline tags on individual claims. The 'etc.' in the plan's 'year stamps, version numbers, etc.' covers genuinely-non-claim numeric tokens — section ordinals, HTTP status placeholders, PR/issue numbers, file-mode bits. Numbers with semantic meaning to the product narrative MUST be tagged.
